title: Platform settings
description: Global SaaS credentials: WhatsApp and email providers shared by every clinic.

intro.title: These keys are used by the platform, not by clinics
intro.body: Twilio and Brevo credentials are loaded HERE once and reused to send WhatsApp and transactional emails on behalf of every clinic. End clients never see this screen and don't need to open accounts with these providers.

twilio.title: Twilio · WhatsApp Cloud
twilio.description: Twilio project credentials used by the platform to send WhatsApp reminders and notifications.

brevo.title: Brevo · Transactional email
brevo.description: Brevo API key used for platform emails: invites, password reset, alerts.

fields.twilio_token_hint: Authentication token. Find it in the Twilio console.
fields.twilio_token_hint_stored: A token is already stored (encrypted). Enter a new one only to replace it.
fields.twilio_default_from_hint: Meta-approved number used to send messages. International format, e.g. +14155238886 (sandbox).
fields.brevo_api_key_hint: Brevo project service key. Encrypted before being stored.
fields.brevo_api_key_hint_stored: A key is already stored (encrypted). Enter a new one only to replace it.
fields.brevo_default_from_email_hint: Brevo-verified address used as the email sender (e.g. no-reply@vetsaas.com).
fields.brevo_default_from_name_hint: Name shown to recipients. Clinics may override it for their own messages.

footer.never_updated: No global configuration has been saved yet.
